tasks.task: Fix fast event context error in preview.lua
tasks.description: Wrap vim.fn.readfile call in vim.schedule to avoid E5560 error in async callback.

steps.description: Wrap vim.fn.readfile call in vim.schedule callback
Run tests to verify the fix works correctly

tasks.acceptance-criteria: PlantumlCreateUTXT command executes without E5560 error. Preview window displays generated UTXT content correctly. Auto-refresh on save continues to work.

unit: Mock vim.system callback invokes vim.schedule correctly
vim.schedule callback reads file content and passes to outer callback
integration: PlantumlCreateUTXT command creates UTXT file and shows preview window
Preview window displays correct content from generated UTXT file
Auto-refresh updates preview buffer on BufWritePost event
e2e-manual: Open a .puml file and run PlantumlCreateUTXT, verify no error appears
Verify preview window shows correct ASCII diagram

tasks.task: Fix UTXT preview file path mismatch bug
tasks.description: Fix the bug where PlantUML output file path doesn't match the expected path in preview.lua.

steps.description: Add utility function to find newest .utxt file in temp directory
Update generate_utxt_content to use actual output file from PlantUML
Test the fix with PlantumlPreviewUTXT command

tasks.acceptance-criteria: PlantumlPreviewUTXT command must successfully find and read the generated .utxt file. The error 'Can't open file' must not occur. Preview window must display the UTXT content correctly.

unit: util.find_newest_utxt_file returns correct file path when .utxt files exist in temp directory
util.find_newest_utxt_file returns nil when temp directory is empty or doesn't exist
util.find_newest_utxt_file returns the most recently modified .utxt file when multiple exist
integration: generate_utxt_content successfully reads content from actual PlantUML output file
preview_utxt creates preview window with correct content after PlantUML generates file
e2e-manual: Run :PlantumlPreviewUTXT on a .puml file and verify preview window shows UTXT output
Save the .puml file and verify auto-refresh updates the preview window
